content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: low volatility (Vol: 17.3%) and broad participation (Breadth: 5/8 sectors positive), supportive tape and rotation into cyclicals.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Retail & Food leading: SOKM (1W: +15.52% | 1M: +7.89%) ABOVE TREND; Construction & REIT strong: ALARK (1W: +10.17% | 1M: +7.39%) ABOVE TREND; Heavy Industry showing strength: KRDMD (1W: +18.58% | 1M: +10.84%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Banking & Finance lagging: ISCTR (1W: -4.35% | 1M: -14.80%) BELOW TREND; Technology & Telecom weak: KONTR (1W: -11.81% | 1M: -22.28%) BELOW TREND; Transportation under pressure: THYAO (1W: -4.79% | 1M: -0.15%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
KRDMD (1W: +18.58% | 1M: +10.84%) ABOVE TREND; PETKM (1W: +17.37% | 1M: +11.17%) ABOVE TREND; SOKM (1W: +15.52% | 1M: +7.89%) ABOVE TREND; TUPRS (1W: +15.17% | 1M: +37.22%) ABOVE TREND; ALARK (1W: +10.17% | 1M: +7.39%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
KONTR (1W: -11.81% | 1M: -22.28%) BELOW TREND; TRMET (1W: -8.19% | 1M: -4.94%) BELOW TREND; TRALT (1W: -7.91% | 1M: -3.55%) BELOW TREND; HALKB (1W: -7.45% | 1M: -23.63%) BELOW TREND; YKBNK (1W: -6.37% | 1M: -22.95%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Biggest upside momentum: KRDMD (1W: +18.58% | 1M: +10.84%) ABOVE TREND; PETKM (1W: +17.37% | 1M: +11.17%) ABOVE TREND; TUPRS (1W: +15.17% | 1M: +37.22%) ABOVE TREND; downside momentum: KONTR (1W: -11.81% | 1M: -22.28%) BELOW TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking remains weak and should be underweight: AKBNK (1W: -2.76% | 1M: -17.57%) BELOW TREND; GARAN (1W: -3.64% | 1M: -13.68%) BELOW TREND; ISCTR (1W: -4.35% | 1M: -14.80%) BELOW TREND.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy Industry mixed but leading overall: EREGL (1W: +7.92% | 1M: +9.00%) ABOVE TREND; KRDMD (1W: +18.58% | 1M: +10.84%) ABOVE TREND; ASELS (1W: -4.19% | 1M: -13.69%) BELOW TREND — rotate into beaters, avoid idiosyncratic laggards.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy rally intact but dispersion rising: TUPRS (1W: +15.17% | 1M: +37.22%) ABOVE TREND; PETKM (1W: +17.37% | 1M: +11.17%) ABOVE TREND; GUBRF (1W: -6.23% | 1M: -20.42%) BELOW TREND — prefer commodity/scale exposure, trim stressed names.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Lean pro-cyclical: overweight Retail & Food, Heavy Industry and selective Energy; underweight Banking, Technology and Transportation until breadth confirms improvements in lagging groups.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
KRDMD (1W: +18.58% | 1M: +10.84%) ABOVE TREND for continuation or profit-taking; TUPRS (1W: +15.17% | 1M: +37.22%) ABOVE TREND on commodity flows; PETKM (1W: +17.37% | 1M: +11.17%) ABOVE TREND for momentum confirmation; KONTR (1W: -11.81% | 1M: -22.28%) BELOW TREND for potential short-cover or further weakness.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Retail & Food for retail sales/consumption signals; Heavy Industry for cyclicals and export data; Energy & Chemicals for commodity price action and earnings.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Monitor XU100 reaction to recent short-term highs for trend confirmation and intraday support at the week’s low; catalysts: domestic macro prints (CPI, industrial production), CBRT commentary, earnings and regional geopolitical headlines.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
RISK-ON market with low volatility and rotation into cyclicals; Retail & Food, Heavy Industry and selective Energy are the actionable overweight ideas while banks, tech and transport lag. Main risk: breadth narrowing if macro or policy surprises hit; trade momentum but keep stops on laggards.
